title: prunus × parvifolia
intro: Prunus × parvifolia, also known as Chinese cherry or Northern wild plum, is a hybrid tree species that combines the characteristics of Prunus avium and Prunus cerasifera. The bark and leaves of Prunus × parvifolia contain various compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Prunus × parvifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Prunus × parvifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health, reduce stress, and support immune function.
